unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

function.name: Curl_cf_def_close

unit.function_decl: static void conn_report_connect_stats(struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn);

function.name: Curl_cf_def_get_host
Curl_cf_def_adjust_pollset
Curl_cf_def_data_pending
Curl_cf_def_send
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, const void *buf, size_t len, CURLcode *err)

function.name: Curl_cf_def_recv
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, char *buf, size_t len, CURLcode *err)

function.name: Curl_cf_def_conn_is_alive
Curl_cf_def_conn_keep_alive
Curl_cf_def_query
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, int query, int *pres1, void *pres2)

function.name: Curl_conn_cf_discard_chain
Curl_conn_cf_discard_all
Curl_conn_close
Curl_cf_recv
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, int num, char *buf, size_t len, CURLcode *code)

function.name: Curl_cf_send
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, int num, const void *mem, size_t len, CURLcode *code)

function.name: Curl_cf_create
Curl_conn_cf_add
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct connectdata *conn, int index, struct Curl_cfilter *cf)

function.name: Curl_conn_cf_insert_after
Curl_conn_cf_discard_sub
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_cfilter *discard, struct Curl_easy *data, bool destroy_always)

function.name: Curl_conn_cf_connect
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, bool blocking, bool *done)

function.name: Curl_conn_cf_close
Curl_conn_cf_send
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, const void *buf, size_t len, CURLcode *err)

function.name: Curl_conn_cf_recv
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, char *buf, size_t len, CURLcode *err)

function.name: Curl_conn_connect
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, int sockindex, bool blocking, bool *done)

function.name: Curl_conn_is_connected
Curl_conn_is_ip_connected

Curl_conn_is_ssl

Curl_conn_adjust_pollset
Curl_conn_get_host
Curl_cf_def_cntrl
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, int event, int arg1, void *arg2)

function.name: Curl_conn_cf_cntrl
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_cfilter *cf, struct Curl_easy *data, bool ignore_result, int event, int arg1, void *arg2)

function.name: Curl_conn_cf_get_socket
Curl_conn_get_socket
Curl_conn_forget_socket
cf_cntrl_all
function.parameter_list: (struct connectdata *conn, struct Curl_easy *data, bool ignore_result, int event, int arg1, void *arg2)

function.name: Curl_conn_ev_data_attach
Curl_conn_ev_data_detach
Curl_conn_ev_data_setup
Curl_conn_ev_data_idle

unit.comment: /** * Notify connection filters that the transfer represented by `data` * is donw with sending data (e.g. has uploaded everything). */

function.name: Curl_conn_ev_data_done_send

unit.comment: /** * Notify connection filters that the transfer represented by `data` * is finished - eventually premature, e.g. before being complete. */

function.name: Curl_conn_ev_data_done
Curl_conn_ev_data_pause
Curl_conn_ev_update_info
conn_report_connect_stats
Curl_conn_is_alive
Curl_conn_keep_alive
Curl_conn_get_max_concurrent
Curl_conn_sockindex
Curl_conn_recv
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, int sockindex, char *buf, size_t blen, ssize_t *n)

function.name: Curl_conn_send
Curl_pollset_reset
Curl_pollset_change
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct easy_pollset *ps, curl_socket_t sock, int add_flags, int remove_flags)

function.name: Curl_pollset_set
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct easy_pollset *ps, curl_socket_t sock, bool do_in, bool do_out)

function.name: ps_add
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct easy_pollset *ps, int bitmap, curl_socket_t *socks)

function.name: Curl_pollset_add_socks
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct easy_pollset *ps, int (*get_socks_cb)(struct Curl_easy *data, curl_socket_t *socks))

function.name: Curl_pollset_check
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, struct easy_pollset *ps, curl_socket_t sock, bool *pwant_read, bool *pwant_write)
